title: Network Error Scan (Universal Validation)

assertions.step: Record full session HAR during test execution
assertions.expected: HAR file captures all network requests and responses
assertions.actual: HAR recorded for complete test run; 267 network requests captured ✓

assertions.step: Filter for non-2xx responses from app-owned endpoints
assertions.expected: No 4xx/5xx errors from XInventory API or app endpoints
assertions.actual: All 89 app-owned requests returned 2xx (200 OK or 201 Created); 0 errors ✓

assertions.expected: Third-party non-2xx responses ignored if allowlisted
assertions.actual: 5 third-party requests: Google Analytics (beacon 202), Facebook Pixel (beacon 204) — all allowlisted ✓

notes: Phase 2.6: Universal Validation Suite. All app-owned network requests successful (2xx). Third-party non-2xx responses allowlisted.
